ai_limit_reached: AI limit reached. Prioritizing highest risk items.
ioc_limit_reached: IOC limit reached. Analyzing statistical sample.
language_changed_text: The language change will be applied the next time you open the program.
ioc_input_label: Enter Targets (IPs, URLs - one per line)
cli_app_help:
[bold cyan]ThreatDeflect[/bold cyan] - Threat Intelligence & Analysis Platform.

Analyze IPs, URLs, file hashes and Git repositories against multiple threat intelligence sources (VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, Shodan, URLhaus, MalwareBazaar). Optionally generate AI-powered executive summaries via local Ollama models.

[dim]Requires API keys configured via[/dim] [green]threatdeflect config set[/green][dim]. Use[/dim] [green]threatdeflect config show[/green] [dim]to check current status.[/dim]
cli_help_more_info: For detailed help on a specific command:
cli_ioc_example1_desc: Analyze multiple targets and generate an AI summary
cli_ioc_example2_desc: Read targets from a text file (one per line)
cli_ioc_example3_desc: Analyze a single IP and save to a custom path
cli_ioc_example4_desc: Analyze multiple IPs and URLs at once
cli_repo_example1_desc: Analyze a repository and generate a summary with the 'mistral' model
cli_repo_example3_desc: Analyze and save to a specific file
cli_config_example3_desc: Set a new location for the log file
cli_config_example5_desc: View all current settings and API key status
cli_file_example1_desc: Analyze multiple files and generate an AI summary
cli_file_example2_desc: Check the reputation of a single file
cli_file_example3_desc: Analyze an executable and save report to a custom path
cli_config_app_help:
Manage API keys, Ollama endpoint, language and log settings.

[dim]API keys are stored securely in the system keyring. Settings are persisted in[/dim] [cyan]~/.config/ThreatDeflect/settings.ini[/cyan][dim].[/dim]
cli_ioc_command_help:
Analyze IOCs (IPs and URLs) against threat intelligence sources.

Queries VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, Shodan and URLhaus in parallel. Generates an Excel report with detailed results per target. Optionally produces an AI-powered executive summary via a local Ollama model.

[dim]Supports: IPv4 addresses, public URLs. Invalid or private targets are automatically filtered out.[/dim]
cli_ioc_arg_targets_help: One or more IPs/URLs to analyze (space-separated).
cli_ioc_option_file_help: Read targets from a text file (one target per line). Can be combined with inline targets.
cli_ioc_option_output_help: Path for the Excel report. [default: Analise_IOCs.xlsx]
cli_option_ai_help: Generate an AI executive summary using a local Ollama model (e.g. llama3, mistral, gemma2). Requires a running Ollama instance.
cli_error_no_targets: No targets provided. Pass IPs/URLs as arguments or use --file to load from a file.
cli_error_cannot_write_to: Cannot write to file: {file}. Check permissions and path.
cli_warning_no_valid_targets: No valid targets found. Check that inputs are valid public IPs or URLs.
cli_analysis_failed: Analysis failed. Check threatdeflect.log for details.
cli_repo_command_help:
Scan Git repositories for security threats and secrets.

Clones the repository, scans for hardcoded secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords), suspicious commands, and extracts IOCs (IPs/URLs) found in the code. Dependencies are also cataloged.

[dim]Supports: GitHub and GitLab URLs (public and private with token configured).[/dim]
cli_repo_arg_urls_help: One or more repository URLs to analyze (GitHub/GitLab, space-separated).
cli_repo_option_output_help: Path for the Excel report. [default: Analise_Repositorios.xlsx]
cli_error_no_valid_repos: No valid repository URLs provided. Use full GitHub/GitLab URLs.
cli_config_set_help:
Store an API key securely in the system keyring.

[dim]Keys are never stored in plain text. They are saved in the OS credential manager (GNOME Keyring, macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Locker).[/dim]
cli_config_set_arg_key_help: Your API key for the service.
cli_error_invalid_service: Unknown service '{service}'. Run 'threatdeflect config set --help' to see available services.
cli_success_key_saved: API key for '{service}' saved securely in the system keyring.
cli_config_set_ollama_help:
Set the Ollama API endpoint URL for AI summaries.

[dim]Default: http://localhost:11434/api/generate. Change this if Ollama runs on a different host or port.[/dim]
cli_config_set_log_path_help:
Set a custom path for the application log file.

[dim]Default: ~/threatdeflect.log. The directory will be created if it does not exist.[/dim]
cli_config_set_log_path_arg_path_help: Full path for the log file (e.g. /var/log/threatdeflect.log).
cli_error_path_not_writable: Path '{path}' is not writable. Check permissions.
cli_success_log_path_set: Log path set to '{path}'. Takes effect on next run.
cli_config_set_lang_help:
Set the application display language.

[dim]Supported: en_us (English), pt_br (Portuguese). Applies to both CLI and GUI on next launch.[/dim]
cli_success_lang_set: Language set to '{lang}'. Takes effect on next run.
cli_config_show_help: Display all current settings, API key status and available Ollama models.
cli_file_command_help:
Check the reputation of local files by their SHA-256 hash.

Computes the SHA-256 hash of each file and queries VirusTotal and MalwareBazaar for known detections, signatures and file metadata.

[dim]The files themselves are never uploaded — only their hashes are sent.[/dim]
cli_file_arg_files_help: One or more local file paths to analyze (space-separated).
cli_file_option_output_help: Path for the Excel report. [default: Analise_Arquivos.xlsx]
cli_error_file_not_found: File not found or is not a regular file: {file}
cli_warning_no_valid_files: Could not generate valid hashes for any of the provided files.
cli_main_epilog_ai_desc: Requires Ollama running locally. Use --ai <model> on any analysis command.
cli_main_epilog_gui_desc: Launch the graphical interface with: threatdeflect-gui
